examples.title: Knapsack DP Solution
examples.code:
ALGORITHM KnapsackDP
BEGIN
  Initialize dp[n+1][W+1]
  FOR i FROM 0 TO n:
    FOR w FROM 0 TO W:
      IF i==0 OR w==0: dp[i][w] = 0
      ELSE IF wt[i-1] <= w:
        dp[i][w] = max(val[i-1] + dp[i-1][w-wt[i-1]], dp[i-1][w])
      ELSE:
        dp[i][w] = dp[i-1][w]
  RETURN dp[n][W]
END
examples.explanation: Builds solution table considering all weight capacities
